name: Zephyr Minerals Ltd.
description: Zephyr Minerals Ltd. is a Canadian-based exploration and development company focused on gold assets, with additional interests in silver, base metals, and lithium. The company's primary asset is the 100%-owned Dawson Gold Property in Colorado, USA, which hosts an NI 43-101 compliant inferred gold resource. Zephyr Minerals is actively working to advance this project through permitting, infill drilling to increase resource confidence, and deep drilling to expand the deposit. The company is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ZFR and on the OTC markets under the symbol ZPHYF.
